case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. MICHAEL SEDANO et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SEDANO, MICHAEL $7,489.88 PRINCIPAL, $1,016.80 INTEREST, $280.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,786.68, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
